subject: data(experience): add independent engagements entry and related skills
body:
Adds the current period (Jan 2024 - Present) covering various
independent projects across audio analytics, web, Fireblocks/crypto,
BPO/contact-centre, and ML/AI. Extends Core skills with sales,
consulting, and contract negotiation, adds PHP to Development, and
introduces a new AI & Automation category for AI (advanced usage),
deep research, and automation.

Tags: data, content, experience, skills
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cv-content
Semver: patch
